sentences.text: Hi, good afternoon Jennifer. This is Dan North with rentable hope you're well wanted to give you a call and and follow, up. I didn't think I'd get you because it sounds like you've been incredibly busy um, both last week and then and this week as well. So I thought it was important to touch base on the discussion we had just because we are going to be under going through pretty substantial changes starting next month both with how we're advertising as well as pricing, that's gonna be some pretty big price changes coming as well. So um, I think it'd be really beneficial if we

can try and continue the discussion and if it makes sense to get something in place before those changes happen, um that would that would probably greatly benefit you. So if you're open to having that conversation um, let me know either way you can you can send me an email otherwise my direct number is six. Oh eight, five one three seven seven six two thanks Jennifer Thompson.

Hello, and thank you for calling Samir and Embassy properties. If you know, the extension of the party you are trying to reach you may dial it at any time. You have reached the voicemail of Jennifer Thomas senior property manager with senior properties. I am in the office today until five PM but unfortunately, I am unable to take your call at this time. If you are calling with the after hours emergency please call Samir at six, one two five zero eight eight seven zero zero. Otherwise. Please leave a detailed message with your name and a number that you can be reached at and I will return your call at my earliest convenience. If you need to fax paperwork. My fax number is six five one four eight nine nine three eight six, thank you and have a good day.
